conditional_surface_status: If the scalar source creates the canonical Higgs doublet with kappa_H = 1 and the other readout bridges are clean, SSB preserves the 1/sqrt(6) doublet Yukawa coefficient.
non_claims: does not identify a scalar source with H_unit
does not promote the Ward theorem
does not use observed top mass or observed Yukawa as input

open_imports.chirality_and_species_selector: connect the scalar-bilinear source to Q_L H q_R with the retained right-handed species assignments
open_imports.lsz_residue: derive the scalar external-leg factor from the pole residue
open_imports.scalar_carrier_map: prove the canonical scalar field selected by the source is the physical Higgs doublet fluctuation
open_imports.source_to_canonical_higgs_normalization: derive kappa_H from the Legendre transform/two-point residue of the scalar source, not by naming the source field

proposal_allowed_reason: SSB algebra is exact, but kappa_H and the source/canonical-field bridge remain open.
